name: wan-huiyan-ecosystem-hygiene
description: Two complementary skills for auditing and maintaining Claude Code ecosystem health: skills usage, memory, handoffs, ADRs, worktrees, and automation.

plugins.name: ecosystem-audit
plugins.description: Full-coverage Claude Code ecosystem audit: skills usage from JSONL session logs, memory hygiene, handoff lifecycle, ADR integrity, worktree lifecycle scoring, and automation health. Produces an interactive HTML report with radar chart.

plugins.name: memory-hygiene
plugins.description: Audit and clean up Claude Code's persistent memory system — MEMORY.md, memory topic files, lessons, axioms, phase templates, and ADRs. Bundled from wan-huiyan/memory-hygiene.
